title: From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman
sourceNotes: Single-cour S1 (12 eps, Apr-Jun 2025); S2 confirmed for 2026 (not covered here). Source is Shigeru Sagazaki's light novel (10 vols as of Dec 2025); the Kazuki Sato manga adaptation (9 vols / ch. 1-40 as of June 2026) tracks the light novel roughly one manga volume per LN volume. S1 corresponds to approximately the first two source volumes (manga ch. 1-10); precise episode-to-chapter boundaries are not documented anywhere yet, so this is an approximate seed — refine via PR.

mappings.arc: Beryl Becomes Special Instructor / Reunion with Former Students
